creator: mkhitrov@gmail.com
text:
Hello,

I'm running PHP 5.2.3 with Suhosin-Patch 0.9.6.2 in a FreeBSD 6.2 jail
and cannot reproduce this problem. I use Lighttpd as my web server
with PHP running as FastCGI. Earlier, I did notice some problems while
using the APC module; the FastCGI processes would continue to run but
would not respond. I couldn't track down exactly what was causing the
problem so I disabled APC until I have some time to look into it.
Without APC I have never noticed any problems running PHP with Suhosin
under FreeBSD jails, at least not with FastCGI and CLI interfaces.

- Maxim Khitrov
